title: eleocharis retroflexa subsp. subtilissima
intro: Eleocharis retroflexa subsp. subtilissima, also known as the dwarf spikesedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis retroflexa subsp. subtilissima include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Eleocharis retroflexa subsp. subtilissima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine practices.
